title: Undervalued Dividend Stocks Watchlist - Adding LyondellBasell
text: We have not removed or added any companies to the list since the last update in mid-April. We are removing HP after this article and replacing it with LYB.

title: LyondellBasell: Delivering On Its Strategy, Without Sacrificing Shareholder Returns
text: LyondellBasell's share price delivered strong returns, even in the face of continued headwinds and business restructuring. The management is focused on making long-term investments in key areas while at the same time streamlining the business.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch on Dividend Hikes as Market Volatility Continues
text: LyondellBasell Industries (LYB), AAON (AAON), SL Green Realty (SLG) and Advanced Drainage Systems (WMS) recently hiked dividends.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Increases Quarterly Dividend by 5%
text: The rising dividend reflects LyondellBasell's (LYB) continuous dedication to offering its shareholders high returns.

title: LyondellBasell raises dividend, to boost dividend yield above 5.5%
text: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. LYB, +0.99% said Friday that it raised its quarterly dividend by 5.0%, to $1.25 a share from $1.19 a share.

title: LyondellBasell Prices Public Offering of Inaugural Green Bond
text: HOUSTON, May 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB) announced today that LYB International Finance III, LLC (“LYB International Finance”), its wholly-owned subsidiary, priced a public offering (the “Offering”) of $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 5.625% Guaranteed Notes due 2033 (the “Notes”). The Notes will be fully and unconditionally guaranteed by LyondellBasell. The Offering is […]...

title: LyondellBasell Introduces Green Financing Framework to Help Further Sustainability Goals
text: HOUSTON, May 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB) today announced it has published its inaugural green financing framework to help advance its long-term sustainability goals. “Our green financing framework reflects the decisive steps we are taking to allocate capital toward initiatives aligned with our sustainability strategy,” said Peter Vanacker, LyondellBasell CEO. “The framework will […]...
